title: Discuss & Draft
subtitle: Draft your priorities with or without AI help, check a scope, save, and see what your community wants.

steps.title: Open Talk
steps.description: Click "Talk" in the navigation bar. This is your civic workspace — where you draft mandates, refine ideas with AI, and see what your community has saved.
steps.alt: The Talk page showing the Discuss & Draft workspace and community summary below

steps.title: The Prompt Box
steps.description: At the top is a text box with three buttons: Add (drops your text directly as a draft bubble), Include AI (sends your text to AI for refinement — both your text and the AI response appear as bubbles), and a Microphone for voice input. Type your idea and choose how to draft it.
steps.alt: The prompt box with Add, Microphone, and Include AI buttons

steps.title: The Draft Workspace
steps.description: Below the prompt is the Discuss & Create Draft box. Every bubble you create lands here, newest on top. Each bubble shows a draft ID (#1, #2), who wrote it (You or AI), and a timestamp. You can edit (pencil icon) or delete (x) any bubble.
steps.alt: Draft workspace showing numbered bubbles with edit and delete controls

steps.title: Check a Scope and Save
steps.description: When a draft bubble is ready, check one of four scope boxes: Federal (Congress), State (legislature), Town (local officials), or Idea (private). Only one scope at a time. Checking a scope reveals a gold Save button. Click Save — the bubble is removed from the workspace and appears in the community summary below.
steps.alt: A draft bubble with Federal checkbox checked and Save button visible

steps.title: Community Summary
steps.description: Below the workspace, saved items appear with filter tabs: View All, Federal, State, Town, My Mandates, My Ideas. Each item shows the content, author attribution (respecting privacy settings), and vote buttons. Click a tab to filter by scope.
steps.alt: Community summary with filter tabs and saved mandate items with author names

steps.title: Groups
steps.description: Click "Groups" in the Talk sub-navigation to see deliberation groups. Join a group to draft with a focused team. Each group has its own Discuss & Draft workspace scoped to the group, with access rules based on your role (facilitator, member, observer).
steps.alt: Groups list page showing available deliberation groups
